title: pyrethrum oxylepis
intro: Pyrethrum oxylepis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, belonging to the genus Chrysanthemum. The plant's medicinal properties are derived from its flowers, which contain pyrethrin, a natural insecticide that also possesses anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of pyrethrum oxylepis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, soothe skin irritations, and provide relief from fever and cold symptoms. Herbal preparations of pyrethrum oxylepis, such as tea or tincture, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
